rules: Use only components and props listed here — they are extracted from real source.
Use only allowedValues for a prop when present; they come from storybook argTypes.
Colours/spacing/radii must be --tesseract-* tokens; never raw values.
No odd numbers in dimensions. Never edit tesseract-tokens.css.
Never substitute Ant Design / MUI / Tailwind / raw Radix.

icons.note: Search/validate icon names with the get_icons MCP tool. TPLibraryIcon accepts any of the libraryCount names; TPIcon uses a curated subset; `variant` must be one of `variants`.

components.name: AnimatedGrid
components.description: lineColor?: string,   // lattice stroke (default faint white for dark surfaces) cometColor?: string,  // travelling pulse color (default white) edgeFade?: number|boolean, // edge-fade strength 0..1 (true → 0.6, false → 0) speed?: number|"slow"|"normal"|"fast", // comet speed multiplier (default 1 / "normal") density?: number,     // 0..1 fraction of lanes that emit comets (default 1 = all) animated?: boolean,   // false → static lattice, no comets (default true). //   prefers-reduced-motion is auto-honored regardless. }} props

props.name: lineColor
props.description: Lattice stroke color

props.name: cometColor
props.description: Travelling pulse color

props.name: edgeFade
props.description: Edge-fade strength — drag up to dissolve the edges more (0 = none, 1 = strong)

props.name: speed
props.description: Comet speed multiplier (also accepts a raw number in code)

props.name: density
props.description: Fraction of lanes that emit comets (1 = all, lower = sparser/calmer)

props.name: animated
props.description: Animate comets. When off — or when the OS prefers-reduced-motion — only the static lattice draws

props.name: surface
props.description: Preview backdrop (demo only — not a component prop)

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Avatar — user/profile mark. Three content types: • image   — pass `src` • initials — pass `name` (first+last initials; single name → first two letters) • icon    — pass `icon` (a Tesseract library icon NAME or a ReactNode) Resolution order: icon → image → initials.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL (content = image)

props.name: name
props.description: Initials source + alt text

props.name: shape
props.description: Corner shape — circle · rounded · square

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: color
props.description: Background (—100) + initials/icon (—600) ramp

props.name: status
props.description: Corner status dot

props.name: ring
props.description: Brand gradient ring

props.name: content
props.description: What the avatar shows

props.name: iconName
props.description: CDN icon name (content = icon; blank = none)

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style for the icon slot

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Badge
components.description: Badge — Status / count indicator atom. Styling: Badge.module.scss (data-variant / data-color selectors).

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual treatment — solid · soft · outline · gradient · dot

props.name: color
props.description: Semantic tone — map it to meaning (success / warning / error / neutral …)

props.name: size
props.description: xs · sm · md · lg

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: The trailing icon name (both mode only)

props.name: sticky
props.description: Square the corners on an edge so it sits flush

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: children
props.description: Label — usually data-bound (e.g. a status string from the backend). Omit, or use icons=

props.name: icons
props.description: Which icon slots to show

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: CDN icon name — the single icon (left / right / icon-only) or the LEFT icon when both

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Button
components.description: Button — the single Tesseract button atom. One component covers every shape: • Text button            <Button>Save</Button> • With icons             <Button leftIcon={…} rightIcon={…}>Save</Button> • Icon-only (square)      <Button icon={…} aria-label="Search" /> • Split (primary + menu)  <Button icon={…} menu={[…]}>New</Button> Styling (variant × theme × size × surface × state) is driven entirely by data-* attributes + Button.module.scss — zero JS for the visual states. The only stateful path is the split-button dropdown (open state + portal).

props.name: variant
props.description: solid · outline · ghost · tonal · link

props.name: theme
props.description: Colour theme — primary · neutral · error · success · warning

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: surface
props.description: Tune contrast for a light or dark background

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: href
props.description: When set, renders a real <a href> with identical styling (great for the link variant). Blank = native <button>

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to width:100% (default is inline width)

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a spinner and block clicks

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive, dimmed

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the leading slot (also the icon-only / split glyph). Blank = none

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the trailing slot (text shape only). Blank = none

props.name: children
props.description: Button label (omit for icon-only)

props.name: shape
props.description: Demo only — which Button shape to render

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style applied to both slots

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox — Tri-state checkbox atom (checked / unchecked / indeterminate). Hand-rolled (no Radix). Renders a <button role="checkbox"> + a hidden native checkbox for form participation. Preserves the data-state attribute the SCSS module selects on, so styling is unchanged.

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: color
props.description: Checked / indeterminate fill + border + focus ring. primary = brand blue (default).

props.name: error
props.description: Red invalid state — border + focus ring use error tokens.

props.name: label
props.description: Label beside the box. Clicking it toggles. Blank = bare box.

props.name: description
props.description: Smaller helper text below the label.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Side the label sits on.

props.name: state
props.description: Tri-state value (indeterminate is reachable here, not just via boolean)

components.name: Chip
components.description: Chip — removable / selectable label pill (filters, multi-select). Auto-layout (inline-flex + gap), Tesseract color tokens, sm/md/lg sizes, 10px radius.

props.name: label
props.description: Chip text

props.name: color
props.description: Accent ramp — default · primary · success · warning · error

props.name: variant
props.description: solid · soft · outline

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the trailing slot (blank = none)

props.name: selected
props.description: First-class active/toggle state — stronger wash + 500 accent border

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the leading slot (blank = none)

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style applied to both slots

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Divider
components.description: Divider — visual separator atom. variant "solid"    — flat single-color line (default) variant "gradient" — fades to transparent at both ends; colour in the middle. Works horizontally and vertically. lineStyle "solid" (default) | "dashed" | "dotted" — switches the rule rendering. For solid + variant="solid" the line is a filled bar (backgroundColor); for dashed/dotted it becomes a CSS border so the gaps show through. label + labelPosition "center" (default) | "start" | "end" — horizontal only: renders the label between two line segments. No label = a plain line (default). inset (number | {start,end}) — indents the line from its ends (px). Default 0.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Rule direction; vertical needs a sized parent

props.name: variant
props.description: Solid bar, or a gradient that fades at the ends

props.name: color
props.description: Line colour — token or CSS value (default slate)

props.name: spacing
props.description: Vertical margin above & below (px)

props.name: thickness
props.description: Line weight in px (default 1)

props.name: lineStyle
props.description: Rule rendering — solid bar, or dashed / dotted border

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label rendered between two line segments (horizontal only)

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Where the label sits along the line

props.name: inset
props.description: Indents the line from both ends (px). Default 0 = full-bleed.

components.name: InputBox
components.description: InputBox — comprehensive, scalable input atom. Interaction states (hover/focus/disabled) are owned by CSS. JS handles controlled value, character filtering, clear, and derived aria attributes.

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: status
props.description: Validation state — default · success · error · warning (drives border + status glyph)

props.name: variant
props.description: default · seamless (borderless, fills a table cell with an inset focus ring)

props.name: allow
props.description: Restrict typed characters

props.name: label
props.description: Field label

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper / error text below the field

props.name: leftIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the leading slot (blank = none)

props.name: rightIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the trailing slot (blank = none)

props.name: leftAddon
props.description: Built-in add-on on the LEFT — text affix · dropdown · CTA button

props.name: rightAddon
props.description: Built-in add-on on the RIGHT — text affix · dropdown · CTA button

props.name: unit
props.description: Fixed suffix inside the field, e.g.

props.name: counter
props.description: +/- stepper (number field)

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: statusIcon
props.description: Override the auto status glyph — a CDN icon name (blank = auto: success→tick-circle · error→danger · warning→warning). Only shows when status ≠ default.

props.name: height
props.description: Override the field height — a number (px) or CSS length. Blank = size default (sm 36 · md 42 · lg 48).

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder shown when empty

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style applied to both slots

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: InputOTP
components.description: InputOTP — one-time-code / PIN input. Renders `length` separate single-char boxes with auto-advance, backspace-to-previous, arrow-key nav, and paste-to-fill across all boxes. Built for 2FA and e-prescription sign-off. Controlled/uncontrolled parity: pass `value` + `onChange`, or `defaultValue`. `onComplete(code)` fires once every box is filled.

components.name: Kbd
components.description: Kbd — a keyboard key/shortcut cap (⌘K, Esc, ↵). Pairs with Command / Menu shortcut hints and shortcut documentation. <Kbd>⌘</Kbd><Kbd>K</Kbd>   ·   <Kbd>Esc</Kbd>

components.name: LoadingIndicator
components.description: LoadingIndicator — Tesseract loading spinner. Three glyphs, all drawn in `currentColor` so they adapt to context (e.g. inside a Button they take the button's text color): • line-simple   — a clean ring with a rotating arc • line-spinner  — 12 spokes with a stepped "chase" • dot-circle    — 8 dots circling

props.name: type
props.description: Spinner glyph style

props.name: size
props.description: Glyph size

props.name: label
props.description: Caption text (also the a11y label)

props.name: speed
props.description: Spin speed — scales each glyph’s base duration.

props.name: color
props.description: Token or CSS color applied to the root; the currentColor glyphs adopt it.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Where the label sits relative to the glyph.

components.name: Logo
components.description: Logo — the Tatva brand marks. Renders the shared SVGs (served from /public/brand) as CSS masks so the same artwork can be recoloured per surface. Two SEPARATE marks (never combined into one lockup): variant "wordmark" — the full brand logo (symbol + word)          default variant "symbol"   — the monochrome symbol on its own Two brand wordmarks (the symbol is shared): brand "practice" — TatvaPractice                                  default brand "care"     — TatvaCare

props.name: variant
props.description: Full wordmark, or the standalone monochrome symbol

props.name: brand
props.description: Which wordmark — TatvaPractice or TatvaCare (symbol is shared)

props.name: tone
props.description: Preset paint. Ignored when `color` is set.

props.name: height
props.description: Height in px; width derives from the aspect ratio. Ignored when `width` is set.

props.name: width
props.description: Width in px; height then derives from the aspect ratio. Wins over `height`.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Optional cap on rendered width (px).

props.name: color
props.description: Arbitrary brand colour / gradient — overrides `tone`. Blank = use `tone`.

props.name: basePath
props.description: Prefix for the brand SVG asset paths (CDN / alt root).

components.name: MedicalIcon
components.importExample: import { MedicalIcon, TPMedicalIcon, tpMedicalIconNames, resolveTPMedicalIconName } from "@/src/components/atoms";
components.description: MedicalIcon (a.k.a. TPMedicalIcon) — health icons are no longer a separate set; they live in the single icon library (/tp-icons/{linear,bulk,bold}). This is a thin convenience wrapper over TPLibraryIcon that keeps the old API working and maps the legacy style names (line → linear, solid → bold).

props.name: name
props.description: Icon name (resolved against the medical subset, then the full library)

props.name: variant
props.description: Icon style (legacy

props.name: color
props.description: Override fill (blank = inherit currentColor)

props.name: alt
props.description: Accessible label (sets role=

props.name: family
props.description: Icon family — defaults to

components.name: Progress
components.description: Progress — a horizontal progress bar (uploads, imports, treatment-plan completion). Determinate when `value` (0–100) is set; indeterminate (animated sweep) when it is omitted/null. Exposes the progressbar role + aria-value* for assistive tech. <Progress value={64} /> <Progress />            // indeterminate

components.name: Radio
components.description: Radio / RadioGroup — Native radio input atoms with Tesseract token styling. RadioGroup manages a controlled group. Radio is a single labeled option.

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: color
props.description: Accent colour for the group (primary = blue). Per-Radio color overrides.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Stack vertically or lay out in a row

props.name: gap
props.description: Override the group gap. Blank = token default (horizontal vs vertical).

props.name: error
props.description: Invalid styling — accent + labels shift to the error ramp.

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.description: A horizontal (or vertical) row of mutually-exclusive options with a sliding indicator marking the active one.**When to use** — switching between a small set (2–5) of views or modes that share the same space: a queue/finished/cancelled filter, a list/grid toggle, a billing-period picker.**When not** — more than ~5 options, or options that need their own labels/icons in a menu, reach for ; an on/off toggle is the ; a yes/no/maybe form field is

props.name: size
props.description: Segment height / text size

props.name: variant
props.description: Pill (rounded) vs block (squared) track

props.name: theme
props.description: Neutral uses a white indicator; primary/success/error/warning use the matching brand colour with white text

props.name: orientation
props.description: Lay the segments in a row (default) or stack them in a column

props.name: radius
props.description: px number, or

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch segments to fill the container width

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the whole control (per-option disable lives on `options`)

props.name: withIcons
props.description: Show a leading icon on every segment

props.name: opt1Icon
props.description: CDN icon name for the first option

props.name: opt2Icon
props.description: CDN icon name for the second option

props.name: opt3Icon
props.description: CDN icon name for the third option

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Shared icon style for all option icons

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Skeleton — Loading placeholder atom. Styling: Skeleton.module.scss (pulse / wave / none animation + base bg). Width / height / border-radius remain inline (fully dynamic per usage). count     — render N stacked skeletons. For variant="text" the LAST line is shortened (~60%) for realism. Default 1 = a single placeholder. animation — "pulse" (default) | "wave" | "none". Driven by a data-animation attribute the SCSS switches on. Always disabled under prefers-reduced-motion. speed     — animation-duration (seconds number, or any CSS time string). Default ~1.5s. Passed through as the --skeleton-speed CSS var.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape to mimic — line of text, avatar, or block

props.name: width
props.description: px or any CSS length (e.g.

props.name: height
props.description: px or any CSS length; text infers from font

props.name: radius
props.description: Restricted radius — a px step, or

props.name: count
props.description: Number of stacked skeletons. For variant=

props.name: animation
props.description: pulse (default) · wave shimmer · none. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

props.name: speed
props.description: Animation duration — seconds number or any CSS time (e.g.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Slider — Range input atom with Tesseract token styling. A fully Tesseract-styled but still-native `<input type="range">` (kept native for accessibility + keyboard support). The filled portion of the track is a CSS gradient driven by `--slider-pct`; the fill colour + thumb ring come from `--slider-fill` (set inline from the `color` prop). See Slider.module.scss.

props.name: min
props.description: Lower bound of the scale

props.name: max
props.description: Upper bound of the scale

props.name: step
props.description: Quantises the value; use a fraction for decimals

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive, dimmed

props.name: color
props.description: Track + thumb tone

props.name: size
props.description: Track thickness / thumb size

props.name: error
props.description: Error styling — e.g. value past a safe limit

props.name: label
props.description: Caption above the track (also the a11y label)

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the live value readout (format with `formatValue`)

props.name: marks
props.description: true = show min & max ticks; or pass an array of {value,label}

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Toggle — on/off toggle switch atom. Hand-rolled (no Radix). Renders a <button role="switch"> + a hidden checkbox for native form participation. Preserves the same data-state and data-size attributes the SCSS module selects on, so styling is unchanged.

props.name: size
props.description: sm · md · lg

props.name: shape
props.description: Pill toggle vs squared toggle

props.name: color
props.description: Checked track colour (primary = blue)

props.name: label
props.description: Adjacent label — clicking it toggles. Blank = bare switch.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Side the label sits on

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled on/off — pair with `onCheckedChange`

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial state for uncontrolled use

components.name: Accordion
components.importExample: import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Accordion — hand-rolled disclosure molecule (no Radix). API mirrors Radix UI Accordion so callers don't change: <Accordion type="single" | "multiple" collapsible value | defaultValue onValueChange> <AccordionItem value="..."> <AccordionTrigger>label</AccordionTrigger> <AccordionContent>body</AccordionContent> </AccordionItem> </Accordion> Each trigger sets `data-state="open|closed"` so existing styling (the chevron rotate selector) keeps working.

props.name: type
props.description: single = one row open at a time · multiple = several can be open

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Single mode: allow the open row to collapse to none

props.name: expandIcon
props.description: CDN icon name for the disclosure indicator (rotates on open)

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Which side the indicator sits on

props.name: density
props.description: Row padding + font scale

props.name: itemIcon
props.description: Tesseract icon shown before each item title

components.name: Alert
components.description: Alert — an inline status banner (allergy/drug-interaction warnings, page-level notices). Persistent and in-flow — distinct from Toast (transient, floating) and ConfirmDialog (modal). <Alert status="warning" title="Allergy on file"> Patient is allergic to penicillin. Review before prescribing. </Alert>

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Breadcrumb — wayfinding for deep navigation (Patients › Ramesh Kumar › Visit). Data-driven (config over markup, per the Tesseract standard): pass `items`, each a crumb. The last item is the current page (rendered as text with aria-current); earlier items are links (real <a> when `href`, else a <button> if `onClick`, else plain text). Long trails collapse to first … last via `maxItems`. <Breadcrumb items={[ { label: "Patients", href: "/patients", icon: "user" }, { label: "Ramesh Kumar", href: "/patients/123" }, { label: "Visit — 24 Jun" },                // current page (no href) ]} />

components.name: Card
components.importExample: import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Card — the default surface container (dashboards, patient tiles, vitals panels). Compound parts (all optional, compose freely): Card · CardHeader · CardTitle · CardDescription · CardContent · CardFooter <Card variant="elevated"> <CardHeader> <CardTitle>Vitals</CardTitle> <CardDescription>Last recorded 2h ago</CardDescription> </CardHeader> <CardContent>…</CardContent> <CardFooter>…</CardFooter> </Card>

components.name: ClinicalTable
components.description: ClinicalTable — an EDITABLE table for RxPad modules (symptoms, vitals, …). Every cell is its OWN input box, composed from the design-system atoms (see cells.jsx): • free text / numeric  → the InputBox atom (variant="seamless") • dropdown (pick)      → the Dropdown molecule (variant="seamless", chevron) • search combobox      → the Dropdown molecule (editable, no chevron, a "Frequently used" header + "Add ‹custom›", key hints) Cells show a blue focus ring and per-cell status rings (success / error / warning) via `column.validate`, or — for a search column — an opt-in `flagCustom` ring on values that aren't in the option list (custom entries). Fixed skeleton (always present, in order): [drag-reorder] · NAME (primary search) · …configurable columns… · NOTES (free text) · ACTION (⋯ menu + delete) NAME and NOTES are mandatory; everything between them is configurable from `columns`. NAME is the PRIMARY KEY — a row's other cells stay locked until it is filled, and the next (draft) row only opens after it.

props.name: deletable
props.description: Delete button in the action column

props.name: showRowMenu
props.description: Show the three-dots row-actions menu

props.name: density
props.description: Row/header height + cell padding

props.name: loading
props.description: Show skeleton rows instead of data

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Pin the header while the body scrolls (pair with maxHeight)

props.name: flagCustom
props.description: Ring the Name cell when the entry is not in the frequently-used list

props.name: actionIconVariant
props.description: Shared icon style for the action glyphs.

props.name: actionIconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family for the action glyphs (blank = auto)

components.name: Command
components.description: Command — a ⌘K command palette: a dialog-hosted, searchable, keyboard-navigable action list for fast global navigation/actions (patient search, quick actions). Data-driven: pass `groups` (or flat `items`); the palette filters live as you type (label + keywords), supports ↑/↓/Enter, and runs the item's `onSelect`. Controlled via `open`/`onOpenChange` (wire it to your ⌘K shortcut), or uncontrolled via `defaultOpen` for demos. <Command open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} placeholder="Search…" groups={[ { heading: "Patients", items: [{ id, label, icon, keywords, onSelect }] }, { heading: "Actions",  items: [{ id, label, icon, shortcut, onSelect }] }, ]} />

components.name: ConfirmDialog
components.description: ConfirmDialog — Tesseract confirmation modal. Three sections: Header · Body · Footer. First-party (built on DialogPrimitive); footer actions use the Button atom. HEADER title        h2 text (24px close icon, always present) BODY description  text callout      a tinted box (text / node) calloutTone  "neutral" | "warning" | "error"   default "warning" neutral → info icon (or none); warning & error → warning icon calloutIcon  boolean   show the callout icon              default true calloutPlacement "above" | "below"  box vs description    default "above" children     custom body content (overrides description/callout) FOOTER — up to three CTA slots: primary · secondary · tertiary. Each slot: <slot>Label, on<Slot>, <slot>Variant, <slot>Theme, <slot>Disabled. <slot>Variant: solid | outline | ghost | tonal | link <slot>Theme:   primary (Tesseract blue) | neutral | warning | error | success CONVENTION (not enforced — developer decides): the PRIMARY CTA is the safe, non-destructive action (e.g. "Keep editing" / "Close"); the destructive action lives on the SECONDARY CTA (e.g. "Discard", themed error). Tertiary sits on the left for an auxiliary action. Legacy aliases (kept working): warning, primaryLabel/onPrimary/primaryTone, confirmLabel/onConfirm/confirmTheme, secondaryLabel/onSecondary, cancelLabel/onCancel, secondaryTone="destructive".

props.name: title
props.description: Dialog headline — the question being confirmed

props.name: size
props.description: Dialog width — sm ~400 · md 480 (default) · lg ~640

props.name: headerIcon
props.description: Leading icon next to the title (CDN icon name; blank = none)

props.name: hideClose
props.description: Hide the always-on close button

props.name: description
props.default: 'Your unsaved edits to this prescription will be lost.'
props.description: Supporting body text explaining the consequence

props.name: primaryLabel
props.description: Primary CTA text — by convention the safe / non-destructive action

props.name: primaryLoading
props.description: Show the Button spinner + disable while an async confirm runs

props.name: secondaryLabel
props.description: Secondary CTA text — by convention the destructive action (theme it error)

props.name: headerIconVariant
props.description: Icon style for the header glyph (default bold)

props.name: calloutIconName
props.description: Pick a Tesseract icon to override the callout icon

props.name: calloutIconVariant
props.description: Icon style for the callout override (default linear)

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family for the header + callout icons (blank = auto)

components.name: DataTable
components.importExample: import { DataTable, DataCell, CellTag, TableActions } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: DataCell — primary line (+ optional subtext), each with optional left/right icons. With subtext the primary truncates at 1 line; without subtext at 2.

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: Row height / density

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Pin the header while the body scrolls (needs `maxHeight`)

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Body scroll height in px when the header is sticky

props.name: zebra
props.description: Alternate row background tint

props.name: hoverable
props.description: Highlight rows on hover

props.name: bordered
props.description: Draw cell borders

props.name: sortable
props.description: Allow sorting on columns that opt in with `sortable`

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Rows per page (pagination mode)

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Leading control column: radios (single) or checkboxes + select-all (multiple)

props.name: dataMode
props.description: How rows are paged: all at once, paginated, or infinite lazy-load

props.name: showStatus
props.description: Include the demo Status tag column

props.name: showActions
props.description: Include the demo sticky Actions column

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: DatePicker — the single Tesseract date/time picker. One component, one popover, every mode (functionality reference: Razorpay Blade DatePicker): mode "single"    pick one date mode "range"     start–end range (1–2 months, quick-select presets) mode "month"     pick a month (month grid + year stepping) mode "year"      pick a year (decade grid) mode "time"      pick a time (hours · minutes · AM/PM) mode "datetime"  pick a date AND a time Shared chrome: month/year drill-down navigation, min/max + per-day disable, keyboard navigation (arrows · Home/End · PageUp/Dn · Enter · Esc), a real form field (label · helperText · status · size · required), staged editing with TP Button CTAs (Clear · Cancel · Apply), and adaptive viewport-aware positioning.

props.name: mode
props.description: Which calendar to render — single date, range, month, year, time, or datetime

props.name: months
props.description: Calendars shown (range)

props.name: showPresets
props.description: Quick-select rail (range)

props.name: size
props.description: Field height — sm · md · lg

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale for date formatting (e.g. en-IN, en-US, fr-FR)

props.name: weekStartsOn
props.description: 0 = Sunday · 1 = Monday

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Show the Clear · Cancel · Apply footer

props.name: commitMode
props.description: When the selection commits

props.name: iconName
props.description: CDN icon name for the trigger (blank = default calendar/clock)

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style applied to the trigger icon

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Dropdown — the single, extensive select/menu molecule. One component covers every selection surface: • single-select        mode="single" • multi-select         mode="multi"   (selected shown as a count or chips) • option control       optionControl="none" | "checkbox" | "radio" • chips in the trigger  chips           (multi — removable Chip atoms) • search box           searchable      (filters options live) • editable combobox     editable        (the trigger IS a typeahead input — type to filter; with allowCustom, add free values) • keyboard-shortcut hint showShortcuts (option.shortcut shown as a kbd) • per-item left/right icon, and a two-line title + subtitle • adjustable width      width="trigger" | "auto" | number(px) • always-visible scroll indicator, adaptive viewport-aware positioning, and full keyboard nav (↑ ↓ Home End Enter Esc). Embedding (table cell, etc.): • variant="seamless"   borderless trigger that fills its container and shows an inset focus/status ring (reuse inside ClinicalTable) • chevron={false}      hide the trigger chevron (a plain search, no dropdown affordance — e.g. the primary "name" column) • status               "success" | "error" | "warning" — per-cell ring colour • groupLabel           a sticky header above the list (e.g. "Frequently used") • allowCustom + addLabel  editable: offer "Add ‹query›" when nothing matches

props.name: mode
props.description: Single value or multi-select array

props.name: optionControl
props.description: Render a checkbox/radio at the start of each option row

props.name: chips
props.description: Multi: show selected as removable chips in the trigger

props.name: searchable
props.description: Add an in-popover search field that filters options (and sections)

props.name: showShortcuts
props.description: Show each option\

props.name: footerHint
props.description: Show a keyboard-hint bar at the bottom of the menu

props.name: actionsAlign
props.description: Alignment of the footer CTA row (`full` stretches them)

props.name: width
props.description: Menu width: match the `trigger`, size to content (`auto`), or a fixed px

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Trigger text shown when nothing is selected

props.name: label
props.description: Field label above the trigger

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the trigger

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading row in the menu (async option fetch)

props.name: emptyLabel
props.description: Text shown when no options match

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the in-popover search field

props.name: placement
props.description: Menu placement relative to the trigger

props.name: clearable
props.description: Single-select: show a clear (×) affordance to reset the value

props.name: withActions
props.description: Render the footer Button CTAs (primary / secondary / tertiary)

props.name: twoLine
props.description: Render each option as a two-line title + `subtitle`

props.name: withIcons
props.description: Show each option\

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style applied to the per-item icons and footer CTA icons

components.name: Empty
components.description: Empty — empty-state for tables, lists, sidebars, and search no-results. A centered icon/illustration + title + description + optional action(s). <Empty icon="folder-open" title="No patients yet" description="Add your first patient to get started." action={<Button leftIcon={…}>Add patient</Button>} />

props.name: description
props.default: 'Add your first patient to start managing appointments and records.'

components.name: Field
components.importExample: import { Field, FieldLabel, FieldControl, FieldDescription, FieldError } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Field — a form-field grammar: link a label, control, description, and error to ANY form control with consistent layout + accessibility, so each control (Checkbox/Radio/Toggle/Slider/Dropdown/DateRangePicker/custom) doesn't re-implement label/help/error wiring. <Field invalid={!!err}> <FieldLabel>Email</FieldLabel> <FieldControl><InputBox placeholder="you@example.com" /></FieldControl> <FieldDescription>We’ll never share it.</FieldDescription> <FieldError>{err}</FieldError> </Field> Field generates ids and, via FieldControl (Slot), injects `id`, `aria-describedby` (→ description + error), and `aria-invalid` onto the control. Parts: Field (root — `invalid`, `orientation` vertical/horizontal) · FieldLabel · FieldControl (wires the control) · FieldDescription · FieldError (role="alert").

components.name: Filter
components.description: Filter — a single "Filter" entry point that opens one panel with grouped, multi-select sections (e.g. Status · Doctors · Types). First-party, no deps. Chosen options appear as removable chips below the bar. Pairs with DataTable (filter the data by the selection); the section set changes per table — just pass a different `groups` config.

props.name: groups
props.description: Filter sections: [{ id, label, type?, options: [{ value, label }] }] — type

props.name: label
props.description: Trigger label

props.name: mode
props.description: live = immediate onChange · apply = stage a draft, fire on Done

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Reset button label (footer + active bar)

props.name: doneLabel
props.description: Footer confirm button label

props.name: width
props.description: Panel width (CSS length, e.g. 320px). Blank = default (240px min-width).

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Panel max height (CSS length). Blank = default 360px.

props.name: triggerIcon
props.description: Tesseract icon on the Filter trigger (defaults to a funnel)

components.name: Header
components.description: Header — the single configurable top bar (home shell, RxPad, print, …). Composed from atoms: Button (every CTA), Avatar, Divider, Badge (dot), Logo. LEFT cluster (in order, all optional): back    boolean   — full-height 40px back button (onBack) logo    ReactNode — brand mark (use the Logo atom) user    { name, meta, avatar?, dropdown? } — patient / user details block title   ReactNode — leading title (+ optional `subtitle` for title + subtext) subtitle ReactNode leading ReactNode — fully custom left content (escape hatch) RIGHT cluster — `actions`: an ordered list (max 8) of typed items. Only `tutorial` and `avatar` are special; everything else is a CTA (the Button atom), and dividers are placed explicitly wherever you want them: { type: "cta", label?, icon?, variant?, theme?, onClick, menu?, badge?, ariaLabel? } label + icon → text CTA; icon only (no label) → icon button; menu → split button (the only Button shape with a dropdown side); badge:{color} → a notification dot on an icon CTA. { type: "avatar", src?, name?, ring?, onClick } { type: "select", options, value, onClick→onChange, icon?, searchable?, width? } — single-select dropdown that reads like a CTA (e.g. clinic switcher); auto-searchable past 5 options. Composes the Dropdown molecule. { type: "tutorial", onClick } { type: "info", label?, value, icon?, iconPosition?, radius? } — non-clickable violet data tag (ward number, doctor name, status); icon left (default) or right; radius defaults to CTA radius. { type: "divider" }       — vertical gradient Divider atom { type: "node", node }    — custom icon — Tesseract library icon NAME (string) or a ReactNode.

props.description: Show the back button (a small, control-sized icon button)

props.description: Back glyph style

props.description: Back glyph corner variant (default

props.description: { name, meta?, avatar?, dropdown? } — patient/user block

props.description: Override the tutorial play glyph (icon name or node)

components.name: HeroBanner
components.description: HeroBanner — The page hero banner. Dark radial-gradient surface with an animated geometric lattice accent (right side, partly off-canvas), an optional back button, and a top-aligned title + subtitle. This is the only banner.

props.description: Numeric height; overrides size. Blank = use size

props.name: tone

props.name: cta2IconName
props.description: Pick from the Tesseract Icons panel (or type a name)

props.name: cta3IconName
props.description: Pick from the Tesseract Icons panel (or type a name)

components.name: Menu
components.importExample: import { Menu, MenuTrigger, MenuContent, MenuItem, MenuSeparator, MenuLabel } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Menu — the shared action-menu primitive (Radix-style compound parts). An accessible, portaled action menu (role="menu" + menuitem) — distinct from Dropdown (which is a value SELECT). Use it for row "…" actions, header overflow menus, and nav flyouts so they share one keyboard/focus/positioning contract. <Menu> <MenuTrigger asChild><Button icon={…} aria-label="Actions" /></MenuTrigger> <MenuContent> <MenuLabel>Row</MenuLabel> <MenuItem icon="edit-2" onSelect={…}>Edit</MenuItem> <MenuItem icon="copy" shortcut="⌘D" onSelect={…}>Duplicate</MenuItem> <MenuSeparator /> <MenuItem icon="trash" danger onSelect={…}>Delete</MenuItem> </MenuContent> </Menu> Parts: Menu (root, controlled/uncontrolled open) · MenuTrigger (asChild) · MenuContent (portal, collision-aware, focus-trapped, arrow-key nav, Escape, click-outside) · MenuItem (icon/shortcut/danger/disabled/onSelect) · MenuSeparator · MenuLabel.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Pagination — page navigation (pairs with DataTable, lists, audit logs). Controlled: pass the 0-indexed `page` + `pageCount` + `onPageChange`. Composes the Button atom for prev / next / page buttons; long ranges collapse to first … window … last around the current page. <Pagination page={p} pageCount={12} onPageChange={setP} />

components.name: Popover
components.description: Popover — a generic anchored floating panel (Radix-style compound parts). The substrate for date pickers, comboboxes, colour/quantity pickers, and rich "more info" panels. Unlike Menu (a list of actions) or Tooltip (hover text), Popover holds arbitrary interactive content in a focus-managed dialog. <Popover> <PopoverTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></PopoverTrigger> <PopoverContent side="bottom" align="start">…</PopoverContent> </Popover> Parts: Popover (root — controlled/uncontrolled `open`) · PopoverTrigger (asChild) · PopoverContent (portal, collision-aware via usePosition, focus-trapped, Escape, click-outside; role="dialog").

components.name: RxPadSection
components.description: One section of an RxPad prescription form — a header (icon + title + action quartet) over a swappable body, with search and  ghost buttons.**When to use** — building a prescription / clinical-note section (Symptoms, Diagnosis, Advice, Follow-up); stack several to compose a full pad.**When not** — a generic editable grid with no RxPad chrome — use /

props.name: title
props.description: Section title in the header.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Secondary line under the title (blank = none).

props.name: mode
props.description: Layout: body above the search, or search above the body

props.name: bodyType
props.description: Body renderer: ClinicalTable · free-text · labelled fields

props.description: Show the default Repeat header action

props.name: showTemplate

props.name: showSave

props.name: showClear

props.name: collapsible

components.name: SecondarySidebar
components.description: SecondarySidebar — the blue-gradient secondary navigation rail (RxPad pattern). Supports collapsed rail (80px) and expanded (200px) modes with nested items, search filtering, badges, and a configurable collapse toggle.

props.name: collapsedWidth
props.description: Rail width in px

props.name: bottomFade
props.description: Bottom fade overlay

props.name: tone
props.description: Rail gradient + fade + active-icon ramp

props.name: density
props.description: Pill / padding / label sizing

props.name: emptyText

props.name: searchIcon
props.description: Icon shown inside the search input

props.name: collapseIcon
props.description: Icon for the collapse/expand toggle button

props.name: caretIcon

props.name: pillRadius
props.description: Pill corner radius (px)

props.name: badgeStyle
props.description: Badge display variant

components.name: Sheet
components.importExample: import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Sheet — a side drawer / panel (mobile sidebar, filters, quick-view, slide-in forms). A modal surface that slides in from an edge. Composes the shared DialogPrimitive (focus trap + scroll lock + Escape + focus restore + role="dialog"/aria-modal) and just adds the edge positioning + slide animation + scrim. <Sheet> <SheetTrigger asChild><Button>Filters</Button></SheetTrigger> <SheetContent side="right"> <SheetHeader><SheetTitle>Filters</SheetTitle><SheetDescription>Refine results</SheetDescription></SheetHeader> … <SheetFooter><SheetClose asChild><Button>Apply</Button></SheetClose></SheetFooter> </SheetContent> </Sheet> Parts: Sheet (root, controlled/uncontrolled `open`) · SheetTrigger (asChild) · SheetContent (`side` left/right/top/bottom, `showClose`) · SheetHeader · SheetTitle · SheetDescription · SheetFooter · SheetClose (asChild).

components.description:

props.description: Active accent token — recolors active chip, rail bar, active labels and flyout. Default blue = unchanged.

props.name: density
props.description: Row/chip density. Compact = 32px chips + tighter padding.

props.name: emptyText

components.name: Tabs
components.importExample: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Tabs — Tesseract tab navigation. First-party, no external deps. Compound API (Radix-shaped, so callers don't change): <Tabs value | defaultValue onValueChange size="md"> <TabsList> <TabsTrigger value="..." leftIcon={<TPIcon .../>} rightIcon={...} tag="3" tagTone="error"> Label </TabsTrigger> </TabsList> <TabsContent value="...">body</TabsContent> </Tabs> TabsTrigger structure (all optional except value + label): leftIcon   ReactNode — icon before the label (use <TPIcon/>); the active tab renders it in the "bulk" family, inactive stays "linear" rightIcon  ReactNode — icon after the tag, on the far right (same variant rule) tag        ReactNode — a pill on the right (count / status) tagTone    "neutral" | "primary" | "success" | "warning" | "error" Active state uses a rounded indicator bar (curved, not a hard underline). Root-level configurability (all optional, defaults preserve the current look): variant         "line" (default underline) | "pill" | "segment" accent / color  token name driving active text + indicator (default --tesseract-blue-600) activationMode  "automatic" (default, select on focus) | "manual" (select on Enter/Space/click) orientation     "horizontal" (default) | "vertical" TabsList: fullWidth       triggers grow to fill the row equally Keyboard: arrow keys move between triggers (Left/Right when horizontal, Up/Down when vertical), Home/End jump to first/last. In "automatic" mode activation follows focus; in "manual" mode focus moves but selection waits for Enter/Space/click.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initially selected tab (uncontrolled)

props.name: size
props.description: Trigger density

components.name: Toast
components.description: Toast — solid dark status message. Only the status icon is colored (semantic: green / gold / red, white for info); text is white / lighter-white on a dark surface (no outer stroke).

props.name: status
props.description: Semantic tone — colours the status icon

props.name: surface
props.description: Surface variant — dark (default) or a light bg + dark text

props.name: title
props.description: Primary message line

props.name: closeIcon
props.description: Library icon name to override the dismiss glyph (blank = close-square)

props.name: progress
props.description: Depleting bar over `duration` (needs duration > 0)

props.name: duration
props.description: 0 = persist; > 0 auto-dismisses

props.name: subtext
props.default: 'Your TatvaPractice Enterprise license expires on 15 June 2026.'

props.name: iconName
props.description: CDN icon name to override the status icon (blank = none)

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style for the override icon

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)

components.name: Tooltip
components.importExample: import { Tooltip, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from "@/src/components/molecules";
components.description: Tooltip — Tesseract tooltip molecule. First-party, no external deps (built on the shared Portal / Slot / usePosition / useEscape / useClickOutside). Two consumption styles: 1. Wrapper:   <Tooltip content="Save" side="bottom"><Button/></Tooltip> 2. Compound:  <TooltipProvider><Tooltip><TooltipTrigger asChild>…</TooltipTrigger> <TooltipContent>…</TooltipContent></Tooltip></TooltipProvider> Variants: trigger      "hover" | "click"     default "hover" hover → opens on enter/focus, closes on leave/blur click → toggles on click, stays open; closes on outside-click, Escape, or the dismiss button dismissible  boolean — show a square × dismiss button inside the tooltip icon         ReactNode — leading icon inside the tooltip (with / without) Other props: side, align, sideOffset, variant ("dark"|"light"), arrow, arrowSize, maxWidth, disabled, whenTruncated (hover only), interactive, closeIcon, closeDelay, skipDelayDuration, portalContainer, open/defaultOpen/onOpenChange.

props.name: content
props.description: Tooltip body (wrapper mode); accepts a ReactNode

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred side; flips to stay on-screen

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the chosen side

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap in px between trigger and bubble

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: Hover open delay in ms

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Delay before the hover tooltip closes

props.name: variant
props.description: Dark (default) or light surface; the arrow tracks it

props.name: arrow
props.description: Show the pointer arrow

props.name: arrowSize
props.description: Arrow size in px

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Max bubble width in px before text wraps

props.name: disabled
props.description: Suppress the tooltip entirely

props.name: whenTruncated
props.description: Hover only — show when trigger text overflows

props.name: interactive
props.description: Hover only — keep open while the pointer is inside the tooltip

props.name: trigger
props.description: Open on hover or on click

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Show a square × close button (pairs with click trigger)

props.name: withIcon
props.description: Render a leading icon before the content

props.name: iconName
props.description: Leading CDN icon name (needs

props.name: iconVariant
props.description: Icon style for the leading icon

props.name: iconFamily
props.description: Override the auto-resolved CDN family (blank = auto)
